notes: Official DJI Enterprise Dealer in Saudi Arabia, headquartered in Riyadh. Signed exclusive partnership with Zain KSA for DJI Dock autopilot platform (Sept 2023). Actively promotes Dock 2 and Dock 3 solutions.
